scripts.build: bun run build:llms && bun run build:agents && bun run build:core
scripts.build:apps: bun run build && bun run build:cli && bun run build:desktop
scripts.dev: bun run build && bun run dev:desktop
scripts.clean: cd llms && bun run clean && cd ../agents && bun run clean && cd ../core && bun run clean && cd ../cli && bun run clean && cd ../desktop && bun run clean
scripts.typecheck: cd llms && bun run typecheck && cd ../agents && bun run typecheck && cd ../core && bun run typecheck && cd ../cli && bun run typecheck && cd ../desktop && bun run typecheck
scripts.test: bun run test:llms && bun run test:agents && bun run test:core && bun run test:cli && bun run test:desktop
